title: Outcome
overview: Reef Hawk, Hollywood's poster child since age six, is not okay. When he learns about an extortion plot tied to a mysterious video, Reef preemptively sets out on a redemption tour to make amends, confront his demons, and avoid getting canceled.

title: Theater. Kollektiv.
overview: The documentary film Theater. Kollektiv. tells the story of this extraordinary group through scenes of everyday life, archives, and excerpts from stage plays. Both current and former members, as well as experts from the Luxembourgish cultural scene, share their perspectives.
